seoTitle: Ashfield vs Atwell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ashfield and Atwell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ashfield and Atwell.
heading: Ashfield vs Atwell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ashfield, Western Australia and Atwell, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Atwell has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Ashfield (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ashfield or Atwell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ashfield has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Atwell scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ashfield scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Atwell scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ashfield or Atwell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Atwell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
